result:
This confirms it: **`src/utils/list.c` does not exist in this repo** (this is wpa_supplicant/hostapd's `dl_list`) — all operations on `struct dl_list` are implemented entirely in the header `src/utils/list.h` as `static inline` functions and function-like macros. There is nothing in a separate `.c` file to enumerate.

**`struct dl_list` definition** — `src/utils/list.h:15-18`
```c
struct dl_list {
	struct dl_list *next;
	struct dl_list *prev;
};
```

**Functions/macros operating on it (all in `list.h`, none in `list.c`):**

Insert:
- `dl_list_add(list, item)` — L28, insert `item` right after `list` (head)
- `dl_list_add_tail(list, item)` — L36, insert `item` at the end (`dl_list_add(list->prev, item)`)

Remove:
- `dl_list_del(item)` — L41, unlink `item` from its list and null its `next`/`prev`

Query/iterate helpers:
- `dl_list_init(list)` — L22, initialize an empty list (self-pointing)
- `dl_list_empty(list)` — L49, test whether list has no items
- `dl_list_len(list)` — L54, walk and count items (linear traversal)
- `dl_list_entry(item, type, member)` — L67, macro: container-of style cast from `dl_list*` to enclosing struct
- `dl_list_first(list, type, member)` / `dl_list_last(list, type, member)` — L70/L74, macros returning first/last entry or NULL
- `dl_list_for_each(item, list, type, member)` — L78, macro: forward iteration loop
- `dl_list_for_each_safe(item, n, list, type, member)` — L83, macro: forward iteration safe against removal during traversal
- `dl_list_for_each_reverse(item, list, type, member)` — L89, macro: reverse iteration loop

Also present: `DL_LIST_HEAD_INIT(l)` (static initializer macro, L20) and `DEFINE_DL_LIST(name)` (declares+initializes a list variable, L94-95).

I verified this both via the ccodegraph node index (all 13 `dl_list*` symbols resolve to `src/utils/list.h`, none to a `.c` file) and by confirming `find`/`ls` find no `src/utils/list.c` on disk.
